name: World Known MFG (Cayman) Limited
summary: World Known MFG (Cayman) Limited produces and sells commercial vehicle parts in the United States, the United Kingdom, Sweden, Denmark, and Japan. The company offers exhaust manifolds, disc brakes, gearbox and pump housing products, and knuckles; and diesel engine and air disc brake components. It serves customers in commercial vehicle, green energy, construction machinery, agricultural machinery, and other industrial equipment industries. The company was founded in 2015 and is based in Grand Cayman, the Cayman Islands.
